source: Sidherun PHB 2_8_2026.docx -- embedded image (media/image3.png), 'Leveling bonuses - Skills', referenced under 'SKILLS Point Allocations'
notes: 'Pool Size' is the total skill points available for allocation at that level. 'Max Points added Per Skill' is the per-skill cap for points added at that level.
Level 11+ Pool Size is given as a rate ('5 per lvl') rather than an absolute value in the source -- preserved as a string.
